ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the publication originates */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of publication (e.g., year) */,
  "euros" REAL /* Financial amount allocated in Euros */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "journal_full_title" TEXT /* Full title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* Print ISSN number */,
  "issn_electronic" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN number */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "indexed_in_crossref" INTEGER /* Indicates if indexed in CrossRef */,
  "pmid" REAL /* PubMed Identifier (PMID) */,
  "pmcid" TEXT /* PubMed Central Identifier (PMCID) */,
  "base_url" TEXT /* Base URL for accessing the publication */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Repository ID for the institutional repository */,
  "ut" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the publication in the system */,
  "doaj" INTEGER /* DOAJ (Directory of Open Access Journals) status */,
  "license_ref" TEXT /* License reference for the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was submitted */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was reviewed */,
  "acceptance_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accepted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors */,
  "funding_sources_ids" TEXT /* IDs of funding sources associated with the publication */,
  "crossref_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier from CrossRef */,
  "pmid_version" TEXT /* Version of the PubMed ID */,
  "pmcid_version" TEXT /* Version of the PubMed Central ID */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the publication is open access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of open access */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "citation_index" TEXT /* Index of citations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher FOREIGN KEY ("publisher") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_full_title FOREIGN KEY ("journal_full_title") REFERENCES journals ("journal_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_license_ref FOREIGN KEY ("license_ref") REFERENCES licenses ("license_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publishing entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to publication */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "open_access_policy" TEXT /* Open access policy of the publisher */,
  "impact_factor_average" REAL /* Average impact factor of journals published by the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Full name of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) */,
  "issn_print" TEXT /* Print ISSN number */,
  "issn_electronic" TEXT /* Electronic ISSN number */,
  "editor_in_chief" TEXT /* Name of the editor-in-chief */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the journal */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the journal is open access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of open access */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the publishers table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication associated with the funding */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount allocated as funding */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number of the funding */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funding */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL for the license terms */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the license is open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the publication */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the publication */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device accessing the publication */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crossref_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication associated with the metric */,
  "crossref_indexed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is indexed in CrossRef */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Count of citations for the publication */,
  "altmetric_score" INTEGER /* Altmetric score of the publication */,
  "scopus_citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations in Scopus */,
  "web_of_science_citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations in Web of Science */,
  "twitter_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of mentions on Twitter */,
  "news_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of mentions in news articles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crossref_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
